Replace.Text: A district for the Baking industry. +1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent raw materials improvement in its supply chain, and +1 [ICON_Production] if built on Hills.

* +1 [ICON_Production] from each adjacent raw materials improvement, and grants +1 [ICON_Gold] in return[NEWLINE]* +2 [ICON_Food] and +1 [ICON_Food] at Feudalism.[NEWLINE]* +1 [ICON_Food] to an adjacent Granary, and +1 [ICON_Gold] in return[NEWLINE]* +1 [ICON_Food] bonus to trade routes to the city, and +1 [ICON_Gold] in return
Just smell that freshly baked bread!
